name: Kazan Federal University
description: One of Russia's oldest and most prestigious universities, recognized by WHO, NMC, and ECFMG. Excellent medical faculty and modern facilities.

name: Sechenov University
description: Russia's leading medical university and one of the oldest in Eastern Europe. World-class clinical training with top NMC/WHO recognition.

name: Pirogov Russian National Research Medical University
description: A leading Russian medical research university with 90+ years of history, producing highly qualified doctors recognized globally.

name: Ural Federal University
description: A major research university in the Urals region offering strong programs in science, technology, and business with affordable tuition fees.

name: Peter the Great St. Petersburg Polytechnic University
description: Historic polytechnic university founded in 1899, recognized as one of Russia's top technical institutions with cutting-edge research facilities.

name: Volgograd State Medical University
description: A reputed medical university offering affordable MBBS education with NMC recognition and strong practical training at affiliated hospitals.

name: Altai State Medical University
description: An established medical institution offering quality education at some of the most affordable rates, with an active international student community.

name: Ulyanovsk Higher Civil Aviation School
description: Russia's premier civil aviation training school offering CPL, ATPL, and Air Traffic Controller programs with ICAO-recognized standards.
